variables.name: API_HOST
variables.description: API listen host.

variables.name: API_HEALTH_URL
variables.description: Health endpoint used by full_stack startup readiness checks.

variables.name: API_INTEGRATION_DATABASE_URL
variables.description: Optional PostgreSQL admin DSN for ephemeral API integration smoke databases.

variables.name: API_PORT
variables.description: API listen port.

variables.name: API_RETRIEVAL_EMBEDDING_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Timeout seconds for API retrieval embedding operations.

variables.name: API_TEMPORAL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Temporal client connect timeout in API server.

variables.name: API_TEMPORAL_RESULT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Temporal workflow result wait timeout in API server.

variables.name: API_TEMPORAL_START_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Temporal workflow start timeout in API server.

variables.name: APP_NAME
variables.description: API service display name.

variables.name: APP_VERSION
variables.description: API service display version.

variables.name: ASR_FALLBACK_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable local ASR fallback when subtitles/transcript fallback are unavailable.

variables.name: ASR_MODEL_SIZE
variables.description: Default local ASR model size.

variables.name: BILIBILI_COOKIE
variables.description: Optional bilibili cookie header used to reduce anti-crawl failures (e.g. code -352).

variables.name: BILIBILI_DOWNLOADER
variables.description: Bilibili download provider strategy: auto | yt-dlp | bbdown.

variables.name: COMMENTS_REPLIES_PER_COMMENT
variables.description: Replies fetched per top-level comment.

variables.name: COMMENTS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Comment API timeout seconds.

variables.name: COMMENTS_TOP_N
variables.description: Maximum top-level comments fetched.

variables.name: CORE_POSTGRES_DB
variables.description: Core services PostgreSQL database name override.

variables.name: CORE_POSTGRES_PASSWORD
variables.description: Core services PostgreSQL password override.

variables.name: CORE_POSTGRES_PORT
variables.description: Core services PostgreSQL exposed host port.

variables.name: CORE_POSTGRES_USER
variables.description: Core services PostgreSQL username override.

variables.name: CORE_REDIS_PORT
variables.description: Core services Redis exposed host port.

variables.name: CORE_TEMPORAL_PORT
variables.description: Core services Temporal frontend exposed host port.

variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.description: Primary SQL database DSN.

variables.name: DIGEST_DAILY_LOCAL_HOUR
variables.description: Local-hour trigger for daily digest scheduling.

variables.name: DIGEST_LOCAL_TIMEZONE
variables.description: IANA timezone used by DailyDigestWorkflow scheduling.

variables.name: DIGEST_TEMPLATE_PATH
variables.description: Custom digest template path.

variables.name: FEED_URLS
variables.description: Comma-separated feed URLs.

variables.name: FULL_STACK_REQUIRE_READER
variables.description: Require reader stack health checks during smoke.

variables.name: FULL_STACK_SMOKE_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS
variables.description: Heartbeat interval seconds for full-stack smoke long-running stages.

variables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
variables.description: Gemini API key loaded from .env or process environment only; used by Gemini-only runtime and live smoke preflight.

variables.name: GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable Gemini computer-use mode in worker runtime.

variables.name: GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE_MAX_STEPS
variables.description: Maximum Gemini computer-use steps per run.

variables.name: GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE_MODEL
variables.description: Gemini model entry for computer-use.

variables.name: GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE_REQUIRE_CONFIRMATION
variables.description: Require explicit confirmation before Gemini computer-use actions.

variables.name: GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Timeout seconds for Gemini computer-use actions.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable Gemini context caching for long text prompts.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_LOCAL_TTL_SECONDS
variables.description: In-process TTL for cached Gemini content references.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_MAX_KEYS
variables.description: Maximum in-process Gemini cache key entries before LRU eviction.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_MIN_CHARS
variables.description: Prompt length threshold to enable Gemini context caching.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_SWEEP_INTERVAL_SECONDS
variables.description: Sweep interval for pruning expired Gemini cache entries.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS
variables.description: TTL for Gemini cached content in seconds.

variables.name: GEMINI_DIGEST_MODEL
variables.description: Gemini model for llm_digest structured generation.

variables.name: GEMINI_EMBEDDING_MODEL
variables.description: Gemini embedding model entrypoint for retrieval/vectorization integrations.

variables.name: GEMINI_FAST_MODEL
variables.description: Gemini model used when llm.speed_priority=true and no model override is provided.

variables.name: GEMINI_INCLUDE_THOUGHTS
variables.description: Whether Gemini may emit thought summaries; keep false for strict JSON consumers.

variables.name: GEMINI_MODEL
variables.description: Default Gemini model for Gemini-only LLM pipeline.

variables.name: GEMINI_OUTLINE_MODEL
variables.description: Gemini model for llm_outline structured generation.

variables.name: GEMINI_STRICT_SCHEMA_MODE
variables.description: Enable strict schema mode for Gemini structured output validation.

variables.name: GEMINI_THINKING_LEVEL
variables.description: Default Gemini thinking level (minimal|low|medium|high) for outline/digest generation.

variables.name: INSTALL_DEPS
variables.description: Whether bootstrap installs dependencies.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Live smoke API base URL override. Parent-shell value has priority over .env-loaded values. [Batch B deprecated] Prefer CLI flag `--api-base-url`; legacy env override is compatibility-only.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_SKIP
variables.description: Skip computer_use smoke scenario when true.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_SKIP_REASON
variables.description: Mandatory reason when LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_SKIP is enabled.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_STRICT
variables.description: Strict mode toggle for computer_use smoke scenario. When true, missing or failed command is treated as failure.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_REQUIRE_API
variables.description: When true, fail live smoke if API is not reachable; otherwise skip.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_REQUIRE_SECRETS
variables.description: When true, fail live smoke if required external provider secrets are missing; otherwise skip.

variables.name: LLM_PROVIDER
variables.description: LLM provider selector; must remain gemini in current Gemini-only runtime mode.

variables.name: LOCK_TTL_SECONDS
variables.description: SQLite lock TTL seconds.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_ADMIN_PASSWORD
variables.description: Miniflux admin password.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_ADMIN_USERNAME
variables.description: Miniflux admin username.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_API_TOKEN
variables.description: Miniflux API token for AI sync.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_BASE_URL
variables.description: Miniflux base URL.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_DB_NAME
variables.description: PostgreSQL database name for Miniflux container.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_DB_PASSWORD
variables.description: PostgreSQL password for Miniflux container.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_DB_USER
variables.description: PostgreSQL username for Miniflux container.

variables.name: MINIFLUX_PORT
variables.description: Miniflux host port exposed by docker compose.

variables.name: NEXTFLUX_PORT
variables.description: Nextflux exposed port.

variables.name: NEXT_DIST_DIR
variables.description: Next.js build output directory override used by parallel web E2E workers.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Public API URL for web bundle/runtime.

variables.name: NOTIFICATION_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable outbound notification delivery.

variables.name: OFFLINE_FALLBACK
variables.description: Allow degraded smoke success when docker/network prevents reader stack startup.

variables.name: OPS_CANARY_INTERVAL_HOURS
variables.description: Polling interval in hours for provider canary workflow.

variables.name: OPS_CANARY_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Provider canary timeout threshold in seconds.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_CACHE_DIR
variables.description: Optional cache directory override for cleanup workflow.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_CACHE_MAX_SIZE_MB
variables.description: Optional post-cleanup cache size cap in MB.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_CACHE_OLDER_THAN_HOURS
variables.description: Optional age threshold in hours for cleanup workflow cache files.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_HOURS
variables.description: Polling interval in hours for cleanup workflow.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_OLDER_THAN_HOURS
variables.description: Age threshold in hours for cleanup workflow target files.

variables.name: OPS_CLEANUP_WORKSPACE_DIR
variables.description: Optional workspace directory override for cleanup workflow.

variables.name: OPS_DAILY_LOCAL_HOUR
variables.description: Local hour (0-23) for daily digest workflow schedule.

variables.name: OPS_DAILY_TIMEZONE
variables.description: IANA timezone name for daily digest scheduling.

variables.name: OPS_NOTIFICATION_INTERVAL_MINUTES
variables.description: Polling interval in minutes for notification retry workflow.

variables.name: OPS_NOTIFICATION_RETRY_BATCH_LIMIT
variables.description: Maximum retry batch size for notification retry workflow.

variables.name: PIPELINE_ARTIFACT_ROOT
variables.description: Pipeline artifact output root.

variables.name: PIPELINE_FRAME_INTERVAL_SECONDS
variables.description: Frame extraction interval seconds.

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_FAIL_ON_PROVIDER_ERROR
variables.description: When true, provider/API errors in LLM steps fail the job rather than degrade.

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_HARD_REQUIRED
variables.description: When true, llm_outline/llm_digest failures are treated as hard failures.

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_INCLUDE_FRAMES
variables.description: Optional override to force frame context inclusion/exclusion in LLM prompts.

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_INPUT_MODE
variables.description: Gemini media resolution strategy (auto|text|video_text|frames_text).

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_MAX_RETRIES
variables.description: Optional retry override for llm_outline and llm_digest steps.

variables.name: PIPELINE_MAX_FRAMES
variables.description: Max frames extracted for multimodal inputs; also caps Gemini frame parts for media resolution.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_ATTEMPTS
variables.description: Pipeline step retry attempts.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_AUTH_ATTEMPTS
variables.description: Optional retry-attempt override for auth pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_AUTH_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Optional base backoff override for auth pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_AUTH_MAX_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Optional max backoff override for auth pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Pipeline retry backoff seconds.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_FATAL_ATTEMPTS
variables.description: Optional retry-attempt override for fatal pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_RATE_LIMIT_ATTEMPTS
variables.description: Optional retry-attempt override for rate-limit pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_RATE_LIMIT_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Optional base backoff override for rate-limit pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Optional max backoff override for rate-limit pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_TRANSIENT_ATTEMPTS
variables.description: Optional retry-attempt override for transient pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_TRANSIENT_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Optional base backoff override for transient pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_TRANSIENT_MAX_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Optional max backoff override for transient pipeline errors.

variables.name: PIPELINE_SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Subprocess timeout seconds.

variables.name: PIPELINE_WORKSPACE_DIR
variables.description: Worker workspace directory.

variables.name: PROFILE
variables.description: Bootstrap profile local|gce.

variables.name: PR_LLM_REAL_SMOKE_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Default API base URL used by local PR real LLM smoke script. [Batch B deprecated] Prefer CLI flag `--api-base-url`; legacy env override is compatibility-only.

variables.name: PYTEST_XDIST_WORKER
variables.description: Pytest-xdist worker id used to derive isolated web E2E runtime directories.

variables.name: READER_ENV_FILE
variables.description: Reader stack profile env path. Default: env/profiles/reader.env.

variables.name: REQUEST_RETRY_ATTEMPTS
variables.description: Retry attempts for RSS/API requests.

variables.name: REQUEST_RETRY_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Retry backoff base seconds.

variables.name: REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds.

variables.name: RESEND_API_KEY
variables.description: Resend API key, required when notifications are enabled.

variables.name: RESEND_FROM_EMAIL
variables.description: Resend sender address, required when notifications are enabled.

variables.name: RSSHUB_BASE_URL
variables.description: RSSHub base URL for feed normalization.

variables.name: RSSHUB_FALLBACK_BASE_URLS
variables.description: Optional comma-separated ordered public RSSHub fallback base URLs.

variables.name: RSSHUB_PUBLIC_FALLBACK_BASE_URL
variables.description: Last-resort public RSSHub base URL fallback when private instance returns anti-crawl errors.

variables.name: SQLITE_PATH
variables.description: Worker SQLite state DB path.

variables.name: SQLITE_STATE_PATH
variables.description: API reads pipeline step state from this SQLite DB.

variables.name: TEMPORAL_NAMESPACE
variables.description: Temporal namespace.

variables.name: TEMPORAL_TARGET_HOST
variables.description: Temporal frontend host:port.

variables.name: TEMPORAL_TASK_QUEUE
variables.description: Temporal task queue name.

variables.name: UI_AUDIT_ARTIFACT_BASE_ROOT
variables.description: Optional base directory that UI audit artifact paths must reside within.

variables.name: UI_AUDIT_GEMINI_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable Gemini-powered UI audit enhancement in API service.

variables.name: VD_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Base URL for API HTTP calls.

variables.name: VD_API_KEY
variables.description: Optional bearer token for MCP -> API requests.

variables.name: VD_ALLOW_UNAUTH_WRITE
variables.description: Explicit local/dev-only override that allows unauthenticated write routes when VD_API_KEY is not configured.

variables.name: VD_API_TIMEOUT_SEC
variables.description: MCP upstream HTTP timeout seconds.

variables.name: VD_MCP_MAX_BASE64_BYTES
variables.description: Maximum accepted base64 payload size (bytes) for MCP tool inputs.

variables.name: WEB_ACTION_SESSION_TOKEN
variables.description: Optional shared secret that enforces action session token validation for server actions.

variables.name: WEB_BASE_URL
variables.description: Target URL for web E2E smoke tests.

variables.name: WEB_E2E_BROWSER
variables.description: Browser engine for web E2E tests (chromium|firefox|webkit).

variables.name: WEB_E2E_VIDEO_MODE
variables.description: Playwright video mode for web E2E: off|on|retain-on-failure.

variables.name: WEB_E2E_TRACE_MODE
variables.description: Playwright trace mode for web E2E: off|on|retain-on-failure.

variables.name: WEB_PORT
variables.description: Web dev server port for full stack script.

variables.name: WITH_CORE_SERVICES
variables.description: Whether bootstrap starts dockerized core services.

variables.name: WITH_READER_STACK
variables.description: Whether bootstrap starts Miniflux+Nextflux reader stack.

variables.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY
variables.description: YouTube Data API key for comments and live smoke probes; must be a real key from .env/process environment and never logged in full.

variables.name: YOUTUBE_SMOKE_URL
variables.description: YouTube URL used by live smoke process scenario.

variables.name: YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT_FALLBACK_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable YouTube transcript API fallback when subtitle files are unavailable.
